name: BLS Public Data API
what_it_does: US Bureau of Labor Statistics public data API providing access to employment statistics, Consumer Price Index, wages, inflation, and other labor market data.
use_cases: CPI and inflation tracking for financial models
not_for: Real-time data (data is released on scheduled publication dates, not real-time)
best_when: Retrieving authoritative US government economic statistics for research, dashboards, or economic modeling.
avoid_when: You need real-time data, non-US data, or require SLA guarantees — this is a free government service with no uptime commitments.

auth.notes: Registration optional. Unregistered users get 25 queries/day and 10 series per query. Registered (free API key) gets 500 queries/day and 50 series per query. No credit card required.

free_tier_limits.queries: 500 queries/day with free API key, 25 without

pricing.notes: Completely free public government API. No charges ever. Rate limits are the only constraint.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Error responses are plain text or inconsistently structured JSON. HTTP status codes not always correct — some errors return 200 with error payload. Rate limit messaging is unclear.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Read-only API; all requests are safe to retry
known_agent_gotchas: Rate limits specified per-day not per-minute — easy to exhaust with bulk requests
Some errors return HTTP 200 with an error payload instead of proper 4xx status
Series IDs are cryptic and require knowledge of BLS nomenclature to construct
Data release schedule must be tracked externally — no push notifications
API v1 still exists but v2 required for registered users; agents must handle both
JSON responses use string types for numeric values in some fields
No pagination — must specify explicit year ranges; max 20 years per request

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. API key is optional and provides no security — it only unlocks higher rate limits. No scope granularity. Public data so security concerns are minimal. Government infrastructure with no published security certifications.
